hero.headline: Your Trusted Partner for Korean Food & Beauty Wholesale
hero.subtext: Direct sourcing from Korean manufacturers. Stable supply, competitive pricing, fast export.

about.description: SalesKR is a global B2B distribution partner, delivering premium Korean cosmetics and food products worldwide. As a direct sourcing specialist with 70+ brand networks, we offer the best products with competitive pricing and stable supply chains.

whatwedo.subtext: SalesKR is continuously evolving to be at the heart of Korean exports, meeting the ever-changing needs of our global partners.

export.stat1_sub: We are exporting to numerous countries worldwide

updates.title: Latest updates from SalesKR
updates.about_text: Partner with SalesKR, The leader in Korean B2B exports

contact_banner.title: contact
contact_banner.subtext: If you have any inquiries about SalesKR, please contact us at any time.

footer.tagline: Bringing the Best of Korean Products Worldwide

contact_page.title: Contact

contact_page.step1_desc: Choose the category that best describes your inquiry.
contact_page.form_products_placeholder: e.g. K-Beauty skincare, Kimchi, OEM cosmetics
contact_page.form_consent: I agree to the collection and use of my personal information for the purpose of responding to my inquiry.
contact_page.success: Thank you for your inquiry. We will respond within 24 hours.

recruit_page.title: Recruit
recruit_page.intro: SalesKR is driving meaningful change, committed to innovation and progress for all.
